headline.purpose: Panel and dialog titles inside the product.

body.purpose: Default UI text. Long-form capped at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, badges, table headers, meta lines.

shadows.name: shadow-xs
shadows.purpose: Inputs, selects, textareas, toggles. Whisper-thin shelf.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Default cards, sidebar inset variant, active tabs.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single committed action per screen. Service Indigo fill, rounded-lg, 40px tall.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: oklch(51.1% 0.262 276.966); color: oklch(0.969 0.016 293.756); border: none; border-radius: 0.65rem; font-family: var(--font-inter, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.10); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(51.1% 0.262 276.966 / 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(1 0 0), 0 0 0 4px oklch(67.3% 0.182 276.935); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent fill with inset stroke; hovers to Mist.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: none; border-radius: 0.65rem; font-family: var(--font-inter, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.922 0 0); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Toolbar/list-row action. No border at rest; hovers to Mist fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: none; border-radius: 0.65rem; font-family: var(--font-inter, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Irreversible actions only. Pepper Red fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); border: none; border-radius: 0.65rem; font-family: var(--font-inter, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.10); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.9); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default field. 36px tall, hairline border, focus ring shifts to Service Indigo.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: calc(0.65rem - 2px); font-family: var(--font-inter, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); outline: none; transition: color 200ms, box-shadow 200ms, border-color 200ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(67.3% 0.182 276.935); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(67.3% 0.182 276.935 / 0.5); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.2); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default container. Hairline border + shadow-sm. Flat at rest.
components.html:
Lunch menu
Last updated 2 hours ago
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 0.65rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-card-title { font-family: var(--font-inter, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin-bottom: 0.375rem; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: var(--font-inter, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); }

components.name: Status Badge — Published
components.description: Published state badge. Service Green tint with leading dot. Identical mapping product-wide.
components.css: .ds-badge-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.696 0.17 162.48 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.4 0.15 162.48); border-radius: calc(0.65rem - 2px); font-family: var(--font-inter, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.696 0.17 162.48 / 0.2); } .ds-badge-dot { width: 0.375rem; height: 0.375rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.696 0.17 162.48); }

components.name: Status Badge — Draft
components.description: Neutral draft state — most common badge in the system.
components.css: .ds-badge-neutral { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.4 0 0); border-radius: calc(0.65rem - 2px); font-family: var(--font-inter, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.6 0 0 / 0.15); }

components.name: Sidebar Item
components.description: Navigation item on Sidebar Vellum. Active state uses Service Indigo on Mist fill.
components.html: DashboardMenusSettings
components.css: .ds-sidebar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.125rem; width: 16rem; padding: 0.75rem; background: oklch(0.985 0.002 247.839); border-right: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); font-family: var(--font-inter, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-sidebar-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.625rem; color: oklch(43.9% 0 0); border-radius: calc(0.65rem - 2px); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 200ms, color 200ms; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: oklch(0.922 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-sidebar-item-active { background: oklch(0.922 0 0); color: oklch(51.1% 0.262 276.966); }

components.name: Alert — Information
components.description: Informational message with leading icon. Cool Blue palette.
components.html:
Menu has unpublished changes
Customers will not see updates until you publish.
components.css: .ds-alert-info { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.75rem; width: 100%; padding: 1rem; background: oklch(0.6 0.118 184.704 / 0.08); color: oklch(0.35 0.1 184.704); border: 1px solid oklch(0.6 0.118 184.704 / 0.5); border-radius: 0.65rem; font-family: var(--font-inter, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif); } .ds-alert-icon { flex-shrink: 0; color: oklch(0.6 0.118 184.704); margin-top: 0.125rem; } .ds-alert-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.005em; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .ds-alert-desc { font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.45 0.1 184.704); }

narrative.overview: Biztro is the digital counterpart to a kitchen's mise en place — every menu item, locale, price, and publish state in its right place, ready to act on the moment service starts. The interface earns trust by being calm, legible, and predictable. Operators come back to it many times per shift; nothing about the surface should compete with the task they're trying to finish. The system is restrained by default. Surfaces are flat off-white with subtle 1px borders doing the structural work that shadows would do in a flashier product. A single indigo primary is reserved for the one action we want operators to commit to on each screen. Status colors carry meaning, never decoration. This explicitly rejects the dashboard tropes the category trains for: no neon-on-black crypto aesthetic, no gradient hero metrics, no gamified achievement flourishes, no template-SaaS marketing decoration bolted onto admin screens.
keyCharacteristics: Flat surfaces, hairline borders, sparing shadows
One indigo accent — used like seasoning, not paint
Semantic color reserved for status, not theming
Two-family typographic system (Be Vietnam Pro display, Inter UI)
Dual-theme (light default, dark supported) — both equally first-class

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Service Indigo is the only chromatic accent on the operational surface. It covers ≤10% of any given screen. If two indigo elements compete for attention on the same screen, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Status-Only Rule
rules.body: Greens, ambers, reds, blues, and violets exist to communicate state, not to theme. Never use them as decorative backgrounds, gradient stops, or hero accents.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Sidebar Vellum carries a 0.002 chroma cool tint. Every other neutral is true grayscale. Don't push tint into card surfaces or page backgrounds.

rules.name: The No-Gradient-Type Rule
rules.body: Type is solid color — Service Indigo, Ink, or Stone. Never background-clip:text with gradients. Emphasis comes from weight, size, or color shift, not from chrome.

rules.name: The Tracking Floor Rule
rules.body: Body text and smaller stays at neutral tracking. Negative tracking is reserved for Display, Headline, and Title. Don't tighten body for polish; it costs legibility on long shifts.

rules.name: The Border-First Rule
rules.body: When in doubt, use a 1px border instead of a shadow. Shadows are reserved for elements that genuinely escape their plane.

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: No colored glows, no gradient halos, no decorative drop shadows behind hero numbers. Focus rings are the only colored emission allowed.

dos: Do use Service Indigo for the one primary action per screen.
Do use 1px border tokens to define every container edge.
Do map status (draft/pending/published/archived) to the same badge variants everywhere.
Do keep the focus ring at ring-2 ring-ring ring-offset-2 on all interactive elements.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — fall back to opacity-only transitions.
Do use semantic Alert variants for status messaging, never raw colored cards.
Do use the xs button-group treatment with shadow-xs for inline toolbars in editor surfaces.
Do keep body line length to 65–75ch in long-form content.
donts: Don't ship a crypto-style neon dashboard.
Don't ship gamified flourishes — confetti is reserved for genuine first-time milestones, never routine actions.
Don't layer template-SaaS marketing decoration over admin screens.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe to flag status.
Don't use background-clip:text with gradients on titles.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default style.
Don't raise hover-elevation on cards in the operational app.
Don't introduce a new accent hue for delight or branding.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy.
Don't wrap simple content in Cards by reflex.
